characters.name: Alien Creatures
characters.description: Alien Creatures TheAlien Creatures, or simplyAliens, are a species of dragon-like alien monsters that appeared in a few episodes ofStreet Sharks. The Alien Creatures were shown to have diverse appearances but the only similarity they shared is their dragon-like appearance.

characters.name: Alien Creatures

characters.name: Bad Rap
characters.description: Bad Rapis the leader ofThe Raptors(not to be confused with the raptors that appeared earlier in the series) and is the main antagonist of season 3, along with his henchmenHaxxandSpittor. He sports mechanical braces on his teeth and wields a rocket-firing gauntlet. His goal is to cause global warming to better suit his living conditions. In a false act of partnership, Bad Rap gaveDr. Paradigmwhat looked like Velociraptor DNA, but was in fact, Iguana DNA and forced the now known as 'Dr. Iguanoid' to become his servant. Bad Rap and his henchmen are the reason why theDino Vengers' world had been decimated,T-Boneand his allies won't stop until he has captured the evil Raptors and send them back to face justice for their crimes. Bad Rap's last appearance inShark-apolypse Now!shows him, Spittor and Haxx leaving the planet.

characters.name: Bends
characters.description: Bendsis a supporting character inStreet Sharks. He is Fission University's technical genius, despite being as much of a goof asStreexandJab. He is theStreet Sharks' best pal even before they became the "Street Sharks" and supplies them with motorbikes and other equipment. He also provides them with a hidden base underneath the University's ice rink. InShark to the Future, it is revealed that he cannot be mutated by a gene-slamming airborne virus. This genetic trait was passed down to his great (x3)-grandson, who is a member of the resistance againstDr. Paradigmin an alternate future. BendsBiographySpeciesHumanStatusActivePhysical DescriptionGenderMaleAlignmentAffiliationStreet Sharks (characters)

characters.name: Big Slammu
characters.description: Big SlammuBig SlammuProduction DetailsFirst AppearanceSharkbaitFinal AppearanceShark-apolypse Now!Voiced byD. Kevin WilliamsBiographyAliasBendsLenaMoby LickRelativesDr. Robert Bolton(father)John Bolton/Ripster(oldest brother)Robert "Bobby" Bolton Jr./Streex(older brother)Clint Bolton/Jab(older brother)SpeciesHuman (formerly)Whale Shark/Human Hybrid (currently)StatusAlivePhysical DescriptionGenderMaleEye ColorDark Blue(human)Black(mutated)AlignmentAlignmentGoodCharacter TraitsFavorite FoodHamburgerChocolate milkshakeLikesPlaying FootballHis brothersDislikesPizzaDr. Paradigm Coop "Big Slammu" Boltonis the sport-oriented brother, and the strongest (as well as youngest) of thefour. He was a football player in high school. InSharkbait, he uses a skateboard to get around. When he transforms into Slammu, he turns into a half-human Whale Shark. His most prominent attack is called the "Seismic Slam" where Slammu sets off an earthquake by hitting the ground with his fists really hard. He was voiced byD. Kevin Williamsin the 1994 TV series.

characters.name: Bolton Brothers
characters.description: TheBolton Brothersare the main protagonist group of the series. They were mutated into shark hybrids byDr. Luther Paradigm(who is their archnemesis). They are currently known as theStreet Sharks.

characters.name: Bolton Brothers

characters.name: Bullzeye
characters.description: Bullzeye! Bullzeyeis a member of theDino Vengers, an intergalactic military unit selected to hunt downThe Raptors. They come from a far away planet inhabited by anthropomorphic dinosaurs self-described as 'soft skin' (different origins than their Extreme Dinosaurs counterparts). They were genetically augmented to be tougher, to complete their mission, and wound up stranded on Earth as were the Raptors.

characters.name: Clammando
characters.description: Clammando Clammandois an antagonist fromStreet Sharks. When Clammando was human, he was a dark Caucasian lanky man and wears a medium blue overalls with a tan colored utility belt, a spring green button-up shirt with the sleeves are folded into cuffs and black shoes.

characters.name: Dino Vengers
characters.description: Extreme Dinosaurs is the spin-off series of theStreet Sharksthat aired from September 1997 to December 1997 with an episode count of 52 (which was more than the episode count of Street Sharks). In this series, the DinoVengers have been given a different origin and some characters are given minor design changes (Bad Rap's color went from a magenta color to an orange color). Along with the new show, there were new characters added. Their catchphrases were "Let's Fossilize 'Em!".

characters.name: Dino Vengers
characters.description: Extreme Dinosaurs is the spin-off series of theStreet Sharksthat aired from September 1997 to December 1997 with an episode count of 52 (which was more than the episode count of Street Sharks). characters.name: Dr. Luther Paradigm
characters.description: Dr. Luther Paradigm Dr. Luther Paradigmis the primary antagonist fromStreet Sharks. He is the archnemesis of theBolton Brothers(who are now called theStreet Sharks). He has been arrested and put in jail for good by thepresidentof the United States with the help of the Street Sharks in the very last episode of the show. Paradigm is a middle-aged naturally bald man with a gray metal eye patch on his right eye and the color of his eyes are black.

characters.name: Dr. Luther Paradigm
characters.description: Dr. Luther Paradigm Dr. Luther Paradigmis the primary antagonist fromStreet Sharks. He is the archnemesis of theBolton Brothers(who are now called theStreet Sharks). Paradigm is a middle-aged naturally bald man with a gray metal eye patch on his right eye and the color of his eyes are black.

characters.name: Dr. Robert Bolton
characters.description: Dr. Bolton when he was human. Dr. Robert Boltonis a major character inStreet Sharks. Dr. Robert Bolton is the father of theBolton Brothers. He is only seen on-screen inSharkbait, where he tries to stopDr. Luther Paradigm's experiments, only for him to become his next test subject--Dr. Bolton ultimately mutates into an inhuman creature and escapes, and afterwards (throughout the rest of the series), we never seen him in person ever since and he's only represented through shadows and slime trails.

characters.name: G.E.C.O. Mutants
characters.description:
Raptor Trio A trio of genetically altered crocodile mutants encountered inShark Source. They were saved byDr. Bolton, a hero in their eyes.
The G.E.C.O.'s (Genetically Engineered Cave Organisms) were a species of crocodilian-like mutants that lived in caves around Fission City. The G.E.C.O's were found at an unknown point by Dr. Robert Bolton and discovered that they were sick from a genetic disability and decided to help them. Dr. Bolton eventually succeeded in helping the creatures and would visit the G.E.C.O.'s when he could.

characters.name: G.E.C.O. Mutants

characters.name: General Bendsini
characters.description: Bends(voiced by Jim Hoggatt) – Fission University's technical genius and a source of comic relief who supplies theStreet Sharkswith their motorbikes and weapons and conceals them underneath the University's ice skating rink. In episode 16, it is revealed that he cannot be mutated by a gene-slamming airborne virus. This genetic trait was then passed down to his great, great, great grandson who is a member of the resistance against Dr. Paradigm in an alternate future as seen in "Shark to the Future".

characters.name: Guy in the Sky
characters.description: Guy in the Skyis Fission City's top air radio reporter and paparazzo. He was never fully seen but recognized by a yellow helicopter. The Guy in the Sky was later dropped from the show after first season, although is voice was heard inRebel Sharks.

characters.name: Guy in the Sky
characters.description: Guy in the Skyis Fission City's top air radio reporter and paparazzo. He was never fully seen but recognized by a yellow helicopter. The Guy in the Sky was later dropped from the show after first season, although is voice was heard inRebel Sharks.

characters.name: Haxx
characters.description: Haxx Haxxis one of two Raptor underlings of the evilBad Rap. He has implants on the back of his wrists that can generate green blades and his tail is replaced with a blade-covered mechanical tail that can spin like a drill. He is the most gifted of his group, but his only setback is his low intelligence. Unlike Bad Rap, he wasn't trapped in the Andes mountains when theDino Vengersfirst pursued them. Haxx later in the series was mind controlled byDr. Luther Paradigm, where the mad doctor attempted to take over America. After being thrashed by the Dino-Vengers and Street Sharks left him under the control ofBends, who then sentenced him to pick up litter on the side of the road until Bad Rap and Spittor pulled him into their space ship and fled the planet.

characters.name: Killamari
characters.description: Killamari Killamariis a secondary antagonist inStreet Sharks. He is one ofDr. Luther Paradigm'sSeaviateshenchmen and eventually his right-hand man and second-in-command of them by theThird Season. Before being Gene-Slammed, Killamari resembled a regular squid with a green and purple color scheme.

characters.name: Lena Mack
characters.description: Lena Mackis a supporting character inStreet Sharks​​​​​​.  Lena Mack Lena Mack is a former student ofDr. Paradigmwho suspected that he's not as good-natured as he's supposed to be. Her suspicions proved right when she rescues theStreet Sharksand discovers what he did to them. She helps the brothers whenever she can. She also has a younger brother, Malik, in high school who featured in an episode,A Shark Among Us. Lena seemed to have been written out later on in the series for reasons unknown. Around the time that theDino Vengerswere being introduced, Lena rarely ever appeared and when she did, her role was reduced to that of a non-speaking background character in brief scenes.

characters.name: Malcolm Medusa III
characters.description: Malcolm Medusa III Malcolm Medusa IIIis a villain inStreet Sharks. Malcolm Medusa III is a rich businessperson andbig game hunterwho frequently targets endangered animals for his trophies. During one of his developments, he had to fish out a dock worker that fell into the polluted waters. The dock worker becameClammandowho works as Malcolm Medusa III's henchman.

characters.name: Mantaman
characters.description: Manta Man Mantamanis a protagonist inStreet Sharks. He was formerly a human scientist named Dr. Terrence Morton. Terrence is a scientist with neatly short brown hair, blue eyes and wears black eyeglasses with rectangular lens. He initially wears a light blue space suit and later his pale blue military jumpsuit with white and medium blue designs and his ID was pinned on the left chest and medium blue shoes and white soles.
